MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER / PLAINTIFF, ATHECIA SANCHEZ'S MOTION (OPENING BRIEF) FOR WRIT OF MANDATE TO ENFORCE THE CALIFORNIA PUBLIC RECORDS ACT (GOV. CODE 7923.000)

Appearances:
Tara M. Steeley of the Office of the City Attorney (415.554.4655, tara.steeley@sfcityatty.org) for respondent and opposing party;
Matthey Joens of Joens & Joens (949.851.0866, matthew.joens@gmail.com) for petitioner and moving party.

Court and counsel discuss remaining issues in petitioner's records request. Respondent to produce the following:

Traffic Collision Report without redactions of last names
3 cell phone videos taken by Office Ruiz of the incident (If they have not been produced, they must be. If they have been produced, respondent to specify how they were produced.)
All Body Worn Camera footage that depicts the incident
Command Notifications
Correspondence (text messages, emails, letters) concerning the incident
Reports concerning the incident.

Respondent to provide a statement, under penalty of perjury, regarding what records were provided regarding the incident by May 15, 2026. Parties to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR 4609 (415.272.1753, tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net) (301/HEK)
